app.title: FloraScan
app.subtitle: Professional Plant AI Identifier
app.genus_tooltip: The AI model is currently trained to detect 15 different plant Genera.
app.dataset_desc: This AI model is trained using high-quality image datasets to recognize the following 15 plant genera:

camera.permission_denied: Camera access denied. Please allow camera permissions.
camera.instruction: Point the camera at the plant leaf for identification

result.title: Analysis Result
result.empty_desc: Scan a plant to see the result here.

footer.edu_note: Reference for botanical studies. Not for consumption advice.

pwa.modal_desc: If the install prompt does not appear automatically, use the browser menu to install FloraScan like a regular app.
pwa.android_step1: Open the browser menu from the three-dot button.
pwa.android_step2: Choose Install app or Add to Home screen.
pwa.android_step3: Confirm the install, then open FloraScan from the app icon.
pwa.ios_step2: Tap the Share button at the bottom of the browser.
pwa.ios_step3: Choose Add to Home Screen, then tap Add.
pwa.desktop_step1: Open FloraScan in Chrome, Edge, or another PWA-capable browser.
pwa.desktop_step2: Look for the install icon in the address bar or open the browser menu.
pwa.desktop_step3: Choose Install FloraScan and confirm the installation.

history.title: Scan History Table
history.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this history record?
history.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this scan result? This action cannot be undone.

modal.title: Scan Details
modal.notes_placeholder: Add notes about location, leaf condition, etc...
